title: A visit to a farm
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last Friday, our science class visited a farm outside the city. The farmer showed us around and explained how vegetables are grown and animals are cared for. I had never visited a farm before, so everything seemed very different (27) life in town. We saw chickens running around freely and cows eating in large fields. At one point, the farmer asked whether anyone wanted to help feed the animals. I agreed immediately because I was curious (28) what the experience would be like. Later, we learned that farmers often start work very early (29) the morning and spend long hours outside in all kinds of weather. The farmer said he enjoyed his job because he liked working close (30) nature. Before we left, he gave us some fresh apples to take home. I think the trip helped us understand much more (31) before. It was one of the most educational visits I have been (32) this year.
